narrative:
13 Ohio House district has 79,741 registered voters, with 62.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +12.2% D−R vs +30.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
